profile.name: Annette
profile.title: Royal Technomagi Annette
profile.dislike: People who look down on Technomagic
profile.story: A genius technomagi from the Kingdom of Orvelia. She is highly optimistic, and failure never seems to bother her. She dreams of inventing a device that would allow anyone to handle magic one day. She has a magically engineered assistant whom she brought to life after years of research. Following the arrival of the Demons, she incorporated her research into developing weapons that would allow anyone to fight against the invaders.

1.name: Blasting Ray
1.description:
Deals [ffc800]299*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 189.1% of ATK[-] M.DMG to enemies in a frontal line, reducing ATK by [ff6464]10%[-] for [64ffff]5sec[-] and increasing M.DMG taken by [ff6464]25%[-].

[fa96fa][Overcharge][-]: Deals an additional [ffc800]299*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 189.1% of ATK[-] M.DMG, and additionally increases the ATK reduction by [ff6464]10%[-] and the M.DMG taken increase by [ff6464]25%[-].

2.name: Emergency Treatment
2.description:
Removes all negative effects from all allies, restores [ffc800]124*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 20.1% of ATK[-] HP [64ffff]10[-] times, and increases Status Resistance by [64ff64]300[-].

[fa96fa][Overcharge][-]: Additionally increases all allies’ Crit Chance by [64ff64]250[-], DMG dealt to non-Hero enemies by [64ff64]12%[-], and Status Resistance by [64ff64]300%[-].

3.name: Process of Elimination
3.description:
Detonates an energy orb on a random enemy and nearby enemies, dealing [ffc800]139*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 87.7% of ATK[-] M.DMG.

[fa96fa][Overcharge][-]: Deals an additional [ffc800]57.5% of ATK[-] M.DMG [64ffff]6[-] time(s), increases M.DMG taken by [ff6464]10%[-] for [64ffff]10sec[-], and stuns for [64ffff]3sec[-].

4.name: Charge
4.description:
Gains [64ff64]1[-] [fa96fa][Charge][-] every [64ffff]0.5sec[-], and gains [64ff64]10[-] [fa96fa][Charge][-] whenever [64ffff]1000[-] Mana is consumed.
When [fa96fa][Charge][-] reaches [64ffff]100[-] stacks, enters [fa96fa][Overcharge][-] for [64ffff]15sec[-], empowering Skills.

[fa96fa][Overcharge][-]: Increases ATK by [64ff64]210 + 5.0% of Annette’s ATK[-], and on Normal Attack, reduces cooldown of all Skills by [64ff64]5%[-]. This effect cannot be dispelled, and [fa96fa][Charge][-] cannot be gained while [fa96fa][Overcharge][-] is active.

1.IV: Upon use, the amount of Charge gained is increased by 30%.

2.IV: Upon use, the amount of Charge gained is increased by 30%.

3.IV: Upon use, the amount of Charge gained is increased by 30%.

4.IV: When Overcharged, ATK Spd is increased by [64ff64]250[-].

light.effect: When there is only 1 enemy, damage increases by 100%.

dark.effect: Upon use, the amount of [fa96fa][Charge][-] gained is increased by 40%.
Upon use, the amount of [fa96fa][Charge][-] gained is increased by 40%.
Upon use, the amount of [fa96fa][Charge][-] gained is increased by 40%.

light.effect: [Overcharge] Attack increase amount is increased by 100%.

dark.effect: [Overcharge] duration is increased by 5sec, and on Normal Attack, the cooldown reduction effect of all skills is changed to 12.0%.
[Overcharge] During Overcharge, all allies’ Attack Speed increases by 200%, and Attack increases by 5.0% of Annette’s Attack.

uw.name: Crystallized Technomagic, Rascal
uw.description: Every {0}sec, gains 1, Charge(s) and recovers 1% Mana. This Charge can be gained even while Overcharge is active. During [Overcharge], all allies’ damage dealt to bosses increases by {1}%, and damage taken is reduced by {2}%.
uw.story: The essence of technomagic, created based on Annette's theory. Five of the highest-ranking court wizards of Orvel have poured their energy into creating this magical being. It has its own will, making it capable of making independent decisions and acting on them. While it shares its mana with Annette, it can also utilize any other available mana nearby. As such, it is the first great milestone in Annette's effort to make magic available to all.

1.name: Triplex Condensing Lens
1.description: [Ray of Annihilation] For 10 sec, reduces the target’s Crit Chance by 150 and Mana by {0}.
1.story:
A triplex condensing lens invented by Annette to let Rascal use Blasting Ray.
This special lens can be rotated to control its condensing rate and reflection angle, so that the shape of the photons fired can be easily manipulated.
If all layers are aligned, Rascal shoots a linear photonic laser, and when the layers are cross-linked, it diffuses the reflection of photonic energy to perform Process of Elimination.

2.name: Script of Healing
2.description: [Emergency Treatment] Reduces Mana Cost by 1000 and increases Heal Rate by {0}%.
2.story:
A healing script for emergencies.
It's a product of the secret society of magic engineering, Babel's workshop for the month, 'Battles are Self-serve! Winning scripts in Mechanic Script Battles.' 
Created by Annette, it's a skill that can heal allies just through engineering, without borrowing any healing magic powers.

3.name: Code of Annihilation
3.description: [Process of Elimination] Increases DMG by {0}%, and on attack, gains 2 additional Charge stacks. These stacks can also be gained during Overcharge.
3.story: The top secret code of Babel, the secret society of magic engineering. Magic for normal people! The secret society of technomagi, Babel, is an anonymous society that dreams of making magic available to all. They have each provided a technomagical technique as a secret code, and they've only allowed the use of it to those who can decipher it. Annette deciphered a top secret code in 4 minutes and is using it in the annihilation process.

4.name: High Performance Battery
4.description: [Charge] At the start of battle, gains {0} Charge Stacks, and while in Overcharge, increases Cooldown Reduction from Normal Attacks by 10%.
4.story:
A battery that Annette developed with her technomagic knowledge using a strange material extracted from a fossil of an ancient civilization.
It was initially made to supply backup power to Rascal in emergencies, but it was too powerful that it would overcharge Rascal a little too often.
After thinking about it, Annette decided to use it in combat and customized Rascal's parts to utilize its powers.

sw.description: Summons the soul of Crystallized Technomagic, Rascal for [64ffff]15sec[-], recovering [64ff64]225[-] Mana for all allies every sec, and enters the [fa96fa][Overcharge][-] state. During the duration, increases M.DMG all enemies take by [ff6464]6%[-], and against Bosses, the effect is changed to [ff6464]60.0%[-].

advancement.1: For the duration, increases ATK of all allies by 11%.
advancement.2: Every sec, reduces cooldown of all allies’ skills by 0.125 sec.

sw.story:
Rascal is an autonomous technomagic lifeform with free will, and is one of the wonders of Orvel.
However, Annette’s success with the creation of a technomagic lifeform brought heated discussions among scholars.
Discussions soon turned into debates, and later into conflicts.

Some claimed that Rascal’s existence is a treacherous act against the God, and that it should be eliminated at once, while others viewed Rascal as a miracle, a grand discovery, a salvation to the future of mankind.

Annette did not appreciate this conflict. She only wished to invent items that would help, protect, and make humans happy.
She had zero intention of unmaking Rascal. Rascal was her friend, her inventor partner, and a great assistant.
The source of Annette’s happiness was watching Rascal improve.
There was no way Annette would think about being separated from it.

Meanwhile, Rascal strives to upgrade itself more and more to please Annette who always watched it with a grand expectation...
